title: Viking Therapeutics Stock: Q2 - Confidently Continuing The Recovery
text: Investment analysis of VKTX following Q2 2021 earnings. The article discusses Viking's earnings results and pipeline progress with confidence in the company's recovery trajectory. Analyst discusses Phase 2b VOYAGE study enrollment for VK2809 and progress in early-stage programs. The article maintains a Speculative Buy rating, suggesting the company has significant potential upside but also carries risk typical of clinical-stage biopharmaceutical companies. Key catalysts mentioned include Phase 2 VOYAGE study results and FDA meetings.
